ValidationRule.description: If Candidate Status is "Do Not Use" and is changed to any other value by users who are not in the Admin or Backoffice profiles, display a validation message.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Candidate_Status__c), TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Candidate_Status__c))='Do Not Use', NOT( OR( $User.ProfileId = '00e3h000001kGuG', $User.ProfileId = '00e3h000000lpcL' )))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only Admin or Backoffice users can change the Candidate Status once it is set to DNU
